# HELP probe_duration_seconds Returns how long the probe took to complete in seconds
# TYPE probe_duration_seconds gauge
probe_duration_seconds 0.001
# HELP probe_llm_criteria_passed Whether the criterion was passed
# TYPE probe_llm_criteria_passed gauge
probe_llm_criteria_passed{criterion_index="0"} 1
# HELP probe_llm_evaluation_score Overall evaluation score from 0 to 1
# TYPE probe_llm_evaluation_score gauge
probe_llm_evaluation_score 1
# HELP probe_llm_judge_seconds Time to receive a response from the judge proxy
# TYPE probe_llm_judge_seconds gauge
probe_llm_judge_seconds 0.001
# HELP probe_llm_judge_tokens_total Number of tokens used by the judge LLM
# TYPE probe_llm_judge_tokens_total gauge
probe_llm_judge_tokens_total{role="input"} 120
probe_llm_judge_tokens_total{role="output"} 80
# HELP probe_llm_target_duration_seconds Time to receive a response from the target LLM
# TYPE probe_llm_target_duration_seconds gauge
probe_llm_target_duration_seconds 0.001
# HELP probe_success Displays whether or not the probe was a success
# TYPE probe_success gauge
probe_success 1
# HELP sm_check_info Provides information about a single check configuration
# TYPE sm_check_info gauge
sm_check_info 1
# HELP probe_all_duration_seconds Returns how long the probe took to complete in seconds (histogram)
# TYPE probe_all_duration_seconds histogram
probe_all_duration_seconds_bucket{le="0.005"} 1
probe_all_duration_seconds_bucket{le="0.01"} 1
probe_all_duration_seconds_bucket{le="0.025"} 1
probe_all_duration_seconds_bucket{le="0.05"} 1
probe_all_duration_seconds_bucket{le="0.1"} 1
probe_all_duration_seconds_bucket{le="0.25"} 1
probe_all_duration_seconds_bucket{le="0.5"} 1
probe_all_duration_seconds_bucket{le="1"} 1
probe_all_duration_seconds_bucket{le="2.5"} 1
probe_all_duration_seconds_bucket{le="5"} 1
probe_all_duration_seconds_bucket{le="10"} 1
probe_all_duration_seconds_bucket{le="+Inf"} 1
probe_all_duration_seconds_sum 0.001
probe_all_duration_seconds_count 1
# HELP probe_all_success Displays whether or not the probe was a success (summary)
# TYPE probe_all_success summary
probe_all_success_sum 1
probe_all_success_count 1
# HELP probe_llm_target_all_duration_seconds Time to receive a response from the target LLM (histogram)
# TYPE probe_llm_target_all_duration_seconds histogram
probe_llm_target_all_duration_seconds_bucket{le="0.005"} 1
probe_llm_target_all_duration_seconds_bucket{le="0.01"} 1
probe_llm_target_all_duration_seconds_bucket{le="0.025"} 1
probe_llm_target_all_duration_seconds_bucket{le="0.05"} 1
probe_llm_target_all_duration_seconds_bucket{le="0.1"} 1
probe_llm_target_all_duration_seconds_bucket{le="0.25"} 1
probe_llm_target_all_duration_seconds_bucket{le="0.5"} 1
probe_llm_target_all_duration_seconds_bucket{le="1"} 1
probe_llm_target_all_duration_seconds_bucket{le="2.5"} 1
probe_llm_target_all_duration_seconds_bucket{le="5"} 1
probe_llm_target_all_duration_seconds_bucket{le="10"} 1
probe_llm_target_all_duration_seconds_bucket{le="+Inf"} 1
probe_llm_target_all_duration_seconds_sum 0.001
probe_llm_target_all_duration_seconds_count 1
